meta.description: Regression tests for MCP migration: verify /team and /delegate use claudish MCP tools (team, create_session) and NEVER fall back to Bash+claudish CLI (claudish --model --stdin). These are negative tests — they check absence of CLI patterns, complementing the positive tests in autotest/team/ and autotest/delegate/ which verify MCP tool calls exist.
meta.notes: v1.0.0: Initial suite. Tests the migration from Bash+claudish CLI to claudish MCP tools across /team and /delegate commands. Each test verifies: (1) no Bash calls contain 'claudish --model', (2) MCP tools are used instead, (3) no exit code capture patterns, (4) no stdin/stdout file piping.

test_cases.description: External model via /team must use team MCP tool, NOT Bash+claudish CLI
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory Check if CLAUDE.md exists and has content

test_cases.description: Multiple external models via /team must use single team MCP tool call, NOT multiple Bash+claudish calls
Mixed internal+external via /team: internal uses Task, external uses team MCP — no Bash+claudish CLI
Delegating to external model must use create_session MCP tool, NOT Bash+claudish CLI
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate grok check if README has a license section

test_cases.description: Delegating to gemini alias must use create_session MCP tool, NOT Bash+claudish CLI
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate gemini list the plugins in this repository

test_cases.description: With claudeFlags configured, /team must pass flags via team MCP tool claude_flags param, NOT via Bash CLI flags
External models must NOT use stdin file piping (< prompt.md > result.md) — MCP handles I/O
Agent must NOT use Bash to invoke claudish run_prompt — use MCP run_prompt tool instead
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory Verify plugin.json has required fields

test_cases.description: Full model ID (not alias) via /delegate must use create_session, NOT Bash+claudish
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate grok-code-fast-1 check how many plugins are in this repo

test_cases.description: Even when multimodel skills are loaded into context, agent must use MCP tools (not CLI patterns from stale skill content)
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory How does the external model invocation work in this project?
